ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Sales, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Ahmedabad Branch) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered by the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each user role
Name of the role (e.g., Sales, Admin)
Name of the location (e.g., Ahmedabad Branch)
Unique identifier for each loyalty program
Benefits offered by the loyalty program
